name: 2pc Stainless Steel Roaster with Wire Rack Silver - Figmint™
description:
Roast whole poultry, cuts of meat and much more with this 2-Piece Stainless Steel Roaster with Wire Rack from Figmint™. Made with an aluminum core that's fully surrounded by two layers of stainless steel for quick and even heat distribution, this silver-finish roaster also includes a wire rack that lets drippings fall through and helps meat cook more evenly. The roaster and rack are compatible with gas, electric and induction stoves and oven safe up to 500 degrees, and their surfaces can be used with all utensil types.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure everyday.

Dimensions:
12 Inches x 15.88 Inches
